## TRM1.3. Additional time in terminal airspace (PI#6)

The additional time in 2025 increased to 2.80 min/arr, 6% above the 2024 value -- last year of RP3 -- of 2.63 min/arr (*using the new methodology*).

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of this indicator across Member States in 2025 was 2.98 min/arr.
